publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-11-02 23:58:29 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Division of Nutritional Sciences

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Nutrition and Food

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Food and Nutrition

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Printed Materials, Publications, Reports, Photographs, Financial Records, CDs
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, reports, grants, course syllabi, meeting minutes, program files, awards, photographs, and department reviews concerning the Division.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: RMC Staff, January 2007 Daniel W. Young, February 2010

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, faculty annual reports (some on CDs), grants, course syllabi (on CDs), meeting minutes, program files, awards, photographs, department reviews concerning the Division, and material concerning the Cornell Food and Nutrition Policy Program (CFNPP).

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: See also collections #21-24-3292, Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program Records; #21-24-1975, Cornell University Cooperative Extension Records; and #23-2-2817, Cornell University College of Human Ecology Records; #29-4-2733, Division of Nutritional Sciences Cooperative Extension Nutrition Program Records for related material.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Committees Box 10- Folder: 1-16; Box 18- Folder: 7
Series II. Correspondence Box 8- Folder: 8-34; Box 9- Folders: 1-32
Series III. Directories and Rosters Box 1- Folder: 2
Series IV. Events and Visitors Box 1- Folder: 15,20; Box 9- Folders: 33-34; Box 14- Folder :31
Series V. Facilities Box 1- Folder: 15, 26-38; Box 11- Folders: 1
Series VI. Faculty and Course Syllabi Box 7- Folder: 1-23; Box 13- Folders: 9
Series VIII. Grants and Proposals Box 5- Folder: 13-31; Box 6- Folders: 1-24
Series IX. Programs Box 1; Box 3- Folder: 1-36; Box 4- Folders: 1-33; Box 5- Folders: 1-12; Box 11- Folders: 2-5; Box 18- Folder: 8; Box 22- Folder: 12
Series X. Publications Box 1- Folder: 14, 16-17, 22; Box 13- Folders: 1-11; Box 18- Folders: 1-4
Series XI. Reports; Faculty Annual Reports Box 1- Folder: 21; Box 10- Folders: 17-28; Box 14- Folders: 1-54; Box 15- Folders: 1-28; Box 18- Folder: 9; Box 22
Series XII. Reviews and Strategic Plans Box 1- Folder: 1, 4-13, 24; Box 7- Folders: 24-32; Box 8- Folders: 1-7
Series XIII. Scholarships/Awards Box 2- Folder: 1-19; Box 18- Folder: 10-26
Series XIV. University Concerns Box 10- Folder: 29-35
Series XV. Photographs and Slides Box 12- Folder: 1-31; Box 18- Folder: 5-6

odd.head: General
odd.p: Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/11733

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Division of Nutritional Sciences records, #29-1-3247. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: On March 14, 1974 the Board of Trustees voted to abolish the Graduate School of Nutrition and the Department of Human Nutrition and Food in the College of Human Ecology and to establish the Division of Nutritional Sciences, an intercollege unit within the Colleges of Agriculture and Life Sciences and Human Ecology.
